column1: Extended Data Figure 4: relative volumes among NT/EH/MH assuming within-NT/EH variation equals MH's (4x1185 individual-brain reconstruction). MH=1.0. Means close to Figure 3; SDs much larger. Figure-digitized estimates (+/-0.02).
